Southern Cross Financial / Perth WA

About the firm

A practice built on conversations.

Founded in 2011 by Greg Morrison after a long career in institutional and private banking. Today, fifty-five colleagues across wealth management, financial planning, lending, and corporate advisory.

The firm

What we are.

A mid-tier financial services firm providing wealth management, financial planning, lending, and corporate advisory services across Western Australia. Holds an Australian Financial Services Licence and operates under strict ASIC regulatory oversight. Serves high-net-worth individuals, SME owners, and corporate clients. Known for personalised advice and deep understanding of the WA resource sector wealth cycle.

I
$2.1B funds under advice
As at FY26

The principals

Who you would meet.

A small partnership of advisers and operating principals. Most clients meet the same person for years.

A

Annabel Tan

Head of Compliance & Risk

G

Greg Morrison

/  An invitation  /

For a private conversation.

We are always pleased to meet thoughtful prospective clients and colleagues. Write to us through the contact page and we will respond personally.
